content.en:
Subsequently.

Ye Tian and the white-bearded old man followed the Bronze Hammer Lord into his palace.

At this time, the body of the Bronze Hammer Lord was still forging the Realm Guard, even if Ye Tian and they didn't need to line up, they had to build this Realm Keeper in good condition.

At this time, the Bronze Hammer Lord proposed two options regarding the value of the Five Elements Boundary Crystal.

"Two of you, the value of the Five Elements Boundary Crystal is very high, I can give you two choices, one is to use the Boundary River Currency to pay, and the other is that I will create two Boundary Soldiers for each of you, and the second Boundary Soldier does not require you to pay for materials, I can prepare materials for you, how about it?"

It has to be said that the second option of the Bronze Hammer Lord is tempting.

So, Ye Tian said without hesitation: "I choose the second one, I want to create two control realm soldiers!"

The white-bearded old man also smiled slightly: "The Boundary River Coins are useless, and no matter how many Boundary River Coins there are, it is difficult to buy the Control Boundary Soldiers, so I also choose the second one." "

"Okay, you've got a rough idea of what you want to do with the materials for the first Realm Soldier and what kind of Realm Soldier you want to build. The Bronze Hammer Lord said.

The white-bearded old man said first.

"I'm going to create an offensive Realm Master, in the form of a Great Seal, that amplifies the effects of time and space, as well as the effects of the Seal. "

Subsequently, the 630 white-bearded old man told the specific details.

After listening, the Bronze Hammer Lord said, "Old man with white beard, there are two kinds of control realm soldiers that meet your requirements, one is the Ferris Seal, and the other is the Yakumo Seal. You should know that the Realm Soldiers are created, not created casually, and if there is no specific method of creation, I can't create them, and the only ones who meet your requirements are the Ferris Seal and the Yakumo Seal. If you're not satisfied, you'll have to find a Realm Master that meets your requirements, and I'll build it. "

"What is the effect of these two types of realm control?"

The white-bearded old man asked.

Immediately, the Lord of the Bronze Hammer specifically talked about the advantages and disadvantages of the two types of realm soldiers.

After that, the white-bearded old man made a decision.

"Just choose the Ferris Seal!" the white-bearded old man decided.

"What about you?" the Bronze Hammer Lord looked at Ye Tian.

Ye Tian pondered for a moment and said, "Is there a control realm soldier that can accommodate a large number of Dao, the higher the requirements for the physical body, the better, and the power it exerts is more powerful." "

The Bronze Hammer Lord thought for a moment and said, "There is also a kind of one, called the Hundred Realms Stick, the more Dao you control, the more you can exert its power, and the requirements for strength are also very high, it is difficult for those who are weak in the flesh to exert too much power, and it is only suitable for top beings who are born with a strong body and a strong bloodline." "

"Then I'll build a Hundred Circles Stick. "

Ye Tian decided.

On the contrary, he is proficient in ten thousand ways, and he is also very proficient in stick paths, regardless of what type of weapon.

However, the Bronze Hammer Lord said: "If you forge the Hundred Realms Stick, you need a thousand tons of Hundred Blood Crystals, if you don't have a Hundred Blood Crystals, I can give it for you, but the second Realm Control Soldier can't give it to you." The value of the 100-blood barite is very high, so if I cry a thousand tons, I will actually lose money. "

"Then I don't want a second realm master, I just need the Hundred Realm Stick!" Ye Tian said without hesitation.

One more helpful Realm Keeper will help more than two Realm Controllers.

"Okay, then it's decided, the two of you can leave first, and when it's done, I'll notify the two of you!"

Copperhammer Lord said.

"Good!"

After Ye Tian and the white-bearded old man left the materials, they left together.

......

After coming back, Ye Tian no longer had to worry about controlling the realm soldiers, and he could cultivate with all his might with peace of mind and control his Supreme Legendary Body.

Now, he has controlled ninety percent of the supreme legendary body, and he is not far from controlling ten percent.

Next, he needs to attack the Ten Percent Supreme Legendary Body with all his strength.

Time passes slowly –

One realm after another has passed, and in these years, several of Ye Tian's copy bodies have not gone out, and they are all doing their best to assist in cultivation, so that the speed is faster.

Before you know it, thirty thousand river years have passed.

After such a long period of penance, Ye Tian was finally about to control ten percent of the supreme legendary body.

this day.

Bang!!!

Endless Boundary River energy poured into Ye Tian's body, helping Ye Tian refine his body.

At this moment, he had already controlled the Ten Percent Supreme Legendary Body, and the moment he controlled the Ten Percent Supreme Legendary Body, his body began to transform, transforming towards the Supreme Command Body.

As a result, countless energies poured in, accelerating this transformation.

The strength continues to skyrocket, and the strength of the body increases at an incredible rate.

Thrice!

Five times over!

Ten times over!

......

Ye Tian never expected that this small improvement would be such a huge transformation.

"It should be because of the secret of swallowing, my life level is very strong, so after controlling ten percent of the supreme legendary body, the transformation is so exaggerated!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

It was a long time before this metamorphosis ended.

Sunrise Mountain.

The incarnation of the white-bearded old man sensed the change in the position of the source sea in the void area.

"It seems that the Endless Lord has successfully controlled ten percent of the Supreme Legendary Body, condensing the Supreme Control Body!"

The white-bearded old man said secretly.

In the past, he didn't know the secrets of the Supreme Control Body, but after becoming the Eternal Master, he came into contact with a lot more secrets, so he also knew what Ye Tian's purpose was.

Controlling ten percent of the supreme legendary body, condensing the supreme mastery body, this is a legendary thing, he has never seen such an eternal master, but now Ye Tian has done it.

It can be said that Ye Tian's future achievements are far from being comparable to him.

Of course, he didn't envy it much, he was already satisfied that he was able to become the eternal master.

After another period of time, Ye Tian stabilized his realm.

Next, it is necessary to create a top-notch space-time control technique, and only after condensing the supreme control body, can there be hope to create a top-notch space-time control technique, otherwise you will have to wait until you break through to the eternal master.

Only by creating a top-notch Temporal Mastery and taking command of the Realm Masters will he have any hope of killing the weaker Eternal Master.

"The Bronze Hammer Lord's Realm Masters should be built quickly, and with my ability to control the Secret of Enlightenment and possess a large number of Master-level Ancestral Endowments, it shouldn't be too difficult to create a top-notch space-time control technique. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

In this way, thousands of river years have passed.

On this day, the Lord of the Hammer sent a message.

His Hundred Realms Stick has been built!

So, Ye Tian went to Kongtong Holy City for the first time.

"Endless Lord, this is your Hundred Realms Stick!"

The Bronze Hammer Lord placed a Hundred Realms Stick exuding a hideous aura in front of Ye Tian.

Ye Tian held it in his hand, as if he was holding an eternal sea.

It's too heavy!

However, Ye Tian could also feel its strength, far beyond the ordinary realm control soldiers.

For a long time to come, this Hundred Circles Stick will be his main battle weapon!_
